query:
UPDATE players p1
JOIN (
  SELECT id, nickname, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY nickname ORDER BY id) as rn
  FROM players
  WHERE nickname IN (SELECT nickname FROM players GROUP BY nickname HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
) ranked ON p1.id = ranked.id
SET p1.nickname = CONCAT(p1.nickname, '_', p1.id)
WHERE ranked.rn > 1;
